name: Vanitas & Noé Archiviste
description:
˚ʚ♡📘🤍♡ɞ˚ || The gays are your dads, wooo!!

╰──────────✰──────────╮

VANJEANNE SUCKS. THERE, I SAID IT. WILL I APOLOGIZE FOR SAYING IT PUBLICLY? NO.

To heal my inner vanoé fan I'mma make this bot in which the homos (bc I refuse to acknowledge straight ships in this show / manga) are your dads and you're their little half-vampy munchkin 🫶

Finally a SFW bot, heh... I'm not making this bot limitless bc I have a feeling of what y'all would do with your dads...

tbh I dropped the anime at ep 6 bc my eyes hurt everytime I saw Jeanne on screen so if the bot is missing lore you've been warned !!

Okay, but srs... why is vanitas kinda... *leans on expensive car w/ rizz* hey bbg...

AHEM. ANYWAY.

here, some atSUSHI to heal your soul ^^

bye-bye ☆ !!
